title: Play structure tube connector and system
abstract: A tube connector for a play structure, and a play structure system that uses such tube connectors to connect a plurality of tubes together. The tube connector has a center portion and at least one projecting member extending from the center portion. To construct a play structure, tubes are fitted over the projecting members in the tube connectors. Flexing tabs on the projecting members, which are fixed at the end of the projecting member and extend back toward the center portion, lock into openings in the tubes to secure the tubes to the projecting members and connect the tabes together into a play structure.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A play structure tube connector, comprising: a center portion, the center portion having a center opening therein; a projecting member extending from the center portion, wherein the projecting member comprises a center portion proximate end and a non- center portion proximate end; a flexing tab located disposed on the projecting member, wherein the flexing tab comprises a fixed end toward the non-center portion proximate end of the projecting member and a flexing end toward the center portion proximate end of the projecting member, wherein the center portion is adapted to admit a first tube into the center opening, and the projecting member is adapted to fit inside a second tube, thereby connecting the first tube to the second tube. 2. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein a plurality of projecting members extend from the center portion. 3. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein two flexing tabs are located on opposite sides of the projecting member. 4. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein a projection is disposed on the flexing end of the flexing tab, and the projection is adapted to fit into an opening in the second tube in order to secure the second tube to the projecting member. 5. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein a center flexing member is located on the center portion, and a projection is located on the 

 center flexing member, the projection being adapted to fit into an opening in the first tube in order to secure the first tube to the center portion. 6. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein at least one tab stop is located on the projecting member under the flexing end of the flexing tab, and the tab stop is adapted to limit the motion of the flexing tab. 7. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein at least one abutment is located at the center portion proximate end of the projecting member, and the abutment is adapted to limit the motion of the second tube toward the center portion. 8. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein a bevel is located at the non-center portion proximate end of the projecting member. 9. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein the projecting member lies in the same plane as the center portion. 10. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein the projecting member lies in a different plane from the center portion. 11. A play structure comprising: a plurality of tube connectors, each tube connector having a center portion; at least one projecting member extending from the center portion, the 

 projecting member having a center portion proximate end and a non- center portion proximate end; the projecting member also having at least one flexing tab located thereon, the flexing tab having a fixed end toward the non-center portion proximate end of the projecting member and a flexing end toward the center portion proximate end of the projecting member; a plurality of tubes that fit over the projecting members of the tube connectors, thereby connecting the tubes together into a play structure. 12. The play structure system of claim 11, wherein each tube connector has a center opening in the center portion thereof, and one of the plurality of tubes fits into the center opening. 13. The play structure system of claim 11, wherein a plurality of projecting members extend from the center portion. 14. The play structure system of claim 11, wherein two flexing tabs are located on opposite sides of the projecting member. 15. The play structure system of claim 11, wherein a projection is located on the flexing end of the flexing tab, and the projection fits into an opening in one of the plurality of tubes in order to secure the tube to the projecting member. 16. The play structure system of claim 11, wherein a center flexing member is located on the center portion, and a projection is located on the center flexing member, and the projection fits into an opening in one of the plurality of tubes in order to secure the tube to the center portion. 17. The play structure system of claim 11, wherein more than one length is present in the plurality of tubes. 18. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein the projecting member lies in the same plane as the center portion. 19. The play structure tube connector of claim 1, wherein the projecting member lies in a different plane from the plane of the center portion. 20. A play structure tube connector, comprising: a center portion; two projecting members extending from the center portion, each projecting member having a center portion proximate end and a non- center portion proximate end; each projecting member also having at least one flexing tab located thereon, the flexing tab having a fixed end toward the non-center portion proximate end of the projecting member and a flexing end toward the center portion proximate end of the projecting member; wherein each projecting member is adapted to fit inside a tube, thereby connecting the tubes together.
